query: UPDATE drivers SET display_number = LPAD(id, 2, '0') WHERE display_number IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute UPDATE drivers SET display_number = LPAD(id, 2, '0') WHERE display_number IS NULL;
